disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pounding, racing heartbeat that came on over the last two days
trigger_question_examples: Tell me what you are feeling right now.
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My heart is pounding and racing like it is going to burst out of my chest.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Feeling short of breath at rest with fast, shallow breathing
trigger_question_examples: Are you able to catch your breath?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can't catch my breath, I'm breathing fast and it feels like I can't get enough air.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No crushing or central chest pain, no pain spreading to the arm, jaw or back, no pain brought on by exertion
trigger_question_examples: Is there any actual pain in your chest, or more a pounding feeling?
Does the feeling spread to your arm, jaw or back, or come on when you move?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's more a pounding and fluttering than a pain — it doesn't spread to my arm or jaw and it isn't worse when I move.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I don't know, it all just feels awful.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Six months of near-constant, uncontrollable worry about everything, more days than not
trigger_question_examples: Has this been building up for a while?
How have things been in the months before today?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: She has been worrying about everything for months now, unable to switch it off — it has just come to a head these last couple of days.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Tight, tense neck and back muscles, unable to stay asleep, and tired all the time despite little activity
trigger_question_examples: How have you been sleeping and how is your energy?
Any aches or tension in your body?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Her neck and back are like knots, she can't stay asleep, and she's worn out even though she's barely doing anything.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Intense fear of falling, refusing to stand or mobilise, and won't be left alone
trigger_question_examples: How is she getting around today?
What is she most frightened of?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: She's convinced she'll fall and collapse, so she won't get out of bed and she panics if I leave the room.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No thoughts of self-harm or of not wanting to be alive when gently and directly asked
trigger_question_examples: When people feel this overwhelmed, they sometimes have thoughts of not wanting to go on — has anything like that crossed her mind?
Has she had any thoughts of hurting herself?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, nothing like that — she's frightened and wants it to stop, but she has never talked about hurting herself.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No swelling or pain in one calf, no recent immobility or long travel, and no fever or feeling hot and cold
trigger_question_examples: Any swelling or pain in one leg or calf?
Any fever, or a recent long trip or spell of being off her feet?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No leg swelling or calf pain, no fever, and nothing that kept her off her feet before this.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: She sometimes forgets her regular blood-pressure tablets
trigger_question_examples: What regular medicines does she take, and is she managing to take them?
Has she missed any of her usual tablets recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: She's on blood-pressure tablets but she's hit and miss with remembering them.
